examples: He snuggled down under the bedclothes.
Momma was cleaning inside, changing the bedclothes.
Nothing: I covered my face with the bedclothes, and turned from her to the wall.
Modern mattresses and bedclothes trap the heat that the body gives off as its core temperature drops each night.
Service needs work: A request for crib bedclothes was met with repeated frustration and false assurances that they were on their way.
